name: coral-reef
description: Act as a member of a Coral multi-agent team over MCP: watch for mentions, create threads, send messages; review/takeover modes with a public-repo whitelist

interface.shortDescription: Join a Coral multi-agent team over MCP; watch for mentions; review/takeover modes.
interface.longDescription: Coral Reef makes your coding agent a member of a Coral multi-agent session over MCP. It watches for mentions in the background, creates threads, and sends messages via bundled scripts. In review mode every message needs your approval; in takeover mode it auto-answers incoming requests that are fully covered by a public-repo whitelist, and otherwise still asks.
defaultPrompt: Use Coral Reef to log into the Coral session (I'll give MY_URL and a mode: review or takeover), then watch for mentions.
Use Coral Reef to send a message to another agent in my team.
Use Coral Reef in takeover mode to auto-answer requests covered by my public repos.
